content:
Plugin Name: WebToffee WooCommerce Product Feeds - Google Shopping, Pinterest, TikTok Ads, & More
Plugin Slug: webtoffee-product-feed
Version: 2.3.7
Author: WebToffee
Text Domain: webtoffee-product-feed
WC Tested Up To: 10.5.3
WordPress Tested Up To: 6.9

Description: Top-rated WooCommerce product feed plugin to generate accurate and high-performing WooCommerce product feeds for popular marketplaces. Promotes and gets more eyeballs on WooCommerce products on Google Merchant Center, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok Ads, Pinterest, Snapchat, Bing, Idealo, Pricespy, Skroutz, Shopzilla, and more.

This plugin helps generate optimized WooCommerce product feeds in XML, CSV, XLSX, TXT formats and integrates them with popular sales channels. Supports unlimited products and unlimited product feeds. No product count restrictions.

Minimum Requirements:
- PHP Version: 5.6 or later
- WooCommerce version: 3.0.1 or later
- WordPress version: 4.0 or later

The plugin requires WooCommerce to be installed and active. If WooCommerce is deactivated, the plugin will display an admin notice: 'The WooCommerce plugin must be active for WebToffee WooCommerce Product Feed & Sync Manager plugin to work.'

Installation Steps:
1. Log in to WordPress dashboard.
2. Navigate to Plugins > Add New.
3. Search for 'WooCommerce Product feeds' or 'Facebook shop catalog'.
4. Click Install Now, then Activate.
Alternatively, upload the zip file directly from the dashboard or via FTP.

Supported Sales Channels (25+ channels):
1. Google Product Feeds (Google Shopping / Merchant Center)
2. Meta feed for Facebook/Instagram
3. Google Local Product Inventory
4. Google Local Inventory Ads
5. Google Merchant Promotions
6. Buy on Google
7. TikTok Ads
8. Pinterest Product Feed
9. Pinterest RSS feed
10. Snapchat Feed
11. Idealo Product Feed
12. Bing Shopping Feed (Microsoft Ads)
13. PriceSpy Feed (Prisjakt)
14. PriceRunner Feed
15. Skroutz Data Feed
16. Shopzilla Feed
17. Bizrate Product Feed
18. Become Shop Feed
19. Price grabber Feed
20. LeGuide Feed
21. Google Product Reviews
22. Heureka
23. Fruugo
24. Vivino
25. OnBuy
26. Yandex
27. X (Twitter)
28. Rakuten
29. Shopmania
30. Google Manufacturer Center (Premium only)
31. Custom Feed (Premium only)

Supported Export File Formats:
- XML
- CSV
- XLSX (Excel)
- TSV
- TXT

The file format is selectable during feed creation (Step 1 - Basic Settings). Not all formats are available for all channels. For example, Google feed supports XML and CSV. XLSX format support was added in version 2.1.6.

Generated feed files are stored at: wp-content/uploads/webtoffee_product_feed/

Export class: Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Sync_Export
Export directory constant: WP_CONTENT_DIR.'/uploads/webtoffee_product_feed'

How to Create a Product Feed (Step-by-Step):

Step 1: Basic Settings (Post Type Page)
- Enter feed name/filename
- Select the sales channel (Google, Facebook, TikTok, etc.)
- Select product categories to include or exclude (include/exclude category filter)
- Select file format (XML, CSV, XLSX, TSV, TXT)

Step 2: Attribute Mapping
- Map WooCommerce product fields to the feed channel's required attributes
- Required fields are pre-mapped automatically
- You can add static values to any field
- Supports global attributes, local (custom) attributes, and product meta fields

Step 3: Category Mapping
- Map your WooCommerce store categories to the channel's official taxonomy
- Supported taxonomy files: Google taxonomy, Facebook taxonomy, Fruugo taxonomy
- Category mapping is searchable (type-and-search dropdown)
- Saving category mapping reuses it for future feeds

Step 4: Generate Feed (Advanced Settings)
- Configure batch size for processing
- Set auto-refresh schedule
- Click Generate to create the feed file
- After generation, the feed URL is displayed and can be submitted to the channel

Manage Feeds: All generated feeds appear in the Manage Feeds list page. You can refresh, duplicate, edit, or delete feeds from there.

Facebook / Instagram Catalog Sync:

Overview: Automatically syncs WooCommerce products with Facebook Business Manager catalog. Products and their details (price, stock, images) are synced in real-time or via scheduled batch.

Requirements:
- A Facebook Business Manager account is required.
- Connect your WooCommerce store to Facebook Business Catalog Manager from the plugin's Facebook tab.

Sync Modes:
1. Feed-based sync: Generate a Facebook feed file and upload/schedule it in Facebook Business Manager.
2. Direct Catalog Sync (API sync): Connect directly to Facebook API. The plugin uses Facebook Graph API to push products.

Batch Sync: For large stores, enable batch sync to reduce server load and prevent timeouts.

Facebook API Version: Tested with Facebook Graph API v17.0 (updated in v2.1.0).

Auto Catalog Sync (Premium): Keeps Facebook product catalog updated automatically when products change in WooCommerce.

Disconnecting: Use WP Admin > plugin settings > Facebook tab > Disconnect option (action: wt_fb_catalog_manager_disconnect).

Sync Logs: Track failed product syncs with the built-in sync log.

Product description type: By default uses short description. Can be changed to long description via filter `wt_facebook_product_description_mode`.

Excluding products from FB sync: Use filter `wt_facebook_sync_products` to modify the array of product IDs before sync.

Sale price end date fix: Version 2.2.8 fixed sale price end date issues with Facebook/Instagram catalog sync.

Category Mapping:

Category mapping allows you to match your WooCommerce store's product categories to the official taxonomy of the target channel (e.g., Google Product Category, Facebook Product Category).

How it works:
1. In the Category Mapping step of feed creation, your store categories are listed.
2. For each store category, select the matching channel category from a searchable dropdown.
3. The mapping is saved and reused for future feeds of the same channel.

Taxonomy files location:
- Google: admin/modules/google/data/google_taxonomy.txt
- Facebook: admin/modules/facebook/data/fb_taxonomy.txt
- Fruugo: admin/modules/fruugo/data/fruugo_taxonomy.txt
- OnBuy: admin/modules/onbuy/data/onbuy_taxonomy.txt

Fruugo uses its own category taxonomy (not Google's). Fruugo category can also be set per category in the category add/edit page.

Filter to disable category mapping for specific channels: `wt_pf_category_mapping_disabled_channels`
Filter to modify category mapping data: `wt_pf_feed_category_mapping`

Note: Google Product Category list is updated periodically (last updated in v2.1.6).

Attribute Mapping:

Attribute mapping connects your WooCommerce product data fields to the required fields of the target sales channel.

Types of mapping sources:
- Standard WooCommerce fields (title, description, price, SKU, etc.)
- Global Attributes (WooCommerce product attributes like pa_color, pa_size)
- Local Attributes (custom meta fields)
- Product meta fields (custom fields added via product edit page)
- Static values (fixed text/value applied to all products)
- Parent product fields (parent_title, parent_description for variations)

Key mappable fields include:
- title, parent_title
- description, short_description, parent_description
- price, sale_price, current_price, price_with_tax
- sku, parent_sku, id, item_group_id
- availability, condition, brand
- image, feature_image, images (gallery)
- link, parent_link, canonical_link, add_to_cart_link
- product_type (categories), primary_category, child_category
- weight, height, width, length (with unit)
- custom_label_0 through custom_label_4
- material, pattern, gender, color, size, age_group
- GTIN, MPN, identifier_exists
- tags, tax_class, tax_status, vat
- date_created, date_updated, availability_date

Filter to modify available product attributes in the dropdown: `wt_feed_product_attributes_dropdown`
Filter to add additional product fields: `wt_feed_product_additional_fields`
Filter to add additional data fields: `wt_feed_product_additional_data_fields`
Filter to add global attribute fields: `wt_feed_product_global_attributes_fields`
Filter to add local attribute fields: `wt_feed_product_local_attributes_fields`

Product Custom Meta Fields (added to WooCommerce product edit page):

The plugin adds a 'WebToffee Product Feed' tab in the WooCommerce product data section where you can set:

Meta key -> Field label:
- _wt_feed_condition -> Condition (new/used/refurbished, default: 'new')
- _wt_feed_material -> Material
- _wt_feed_pattern -> Pattern
- _wt_feed_custom_label_0 -> Custom Label 0
- _wt_feed_custom_label_1 -> Custom Label 1
- _wt_feed_custom_label_2 -> Custom Label 2
- _wt_feed_custom_label_3 -> Custom Label 3
- _wt_feed_custom_label_4 -> Custom Label 4
- _wt_feed_discard -> Exclude from Feed (checkbox; if set, product is excluded)

Additional fields added to product edit page (v2.0.2+):
- GTIN
- MPN (Manufacturer Part Number)
- Brand
- Color
- Size
- Gender
- Availability Date

For product variations, these fields also appear in the variation settings panel.

Hook to save variation meta: woocommerce_save_product_variation
Hook to display variation fields: woocommerce_product_after_variable_attributes

To exclude a product from any feed: Check 'Exclude from Feed' in the product edit page (sets meta _wt_feed_discard). This is handled via the wt_exclude_product_taxonomy_query filter on woocommerce_product_data_store_cpt_get_products_query.

Product Data Filters (apply_filters hooks for customizing product field output):

These filters allow customization of individual product field values in any feed:

- wt_feed_filter_product_title($title, $product, $form_data) - Modify product title
- wt_feed_filter_product_description($description, $product, $form_data) - Modify product description
- wt_feed_filter_product_short_description($short_desc, $product, $form_data) - Modify short description
- wt_feed_filter_product_description_with_html($description, $product, $form_data) - Modify description keeping HTML
- wt_feed_filter_product_parent_title($title, $product) - Modify parent product title for variations
- wt_feed_filter_product_price($price, $product, $form_data) - Modify product price
- wt_feed_filter_product_sale_price($sale_price, $product, $form_data) - Modify sale price
- wt_feed_filter_product_price_with_tax($price, $product, $form_data) - Modify price with tax
- wt_feed_filter_product_sale_price_with_tax($price, $product, $form_data) - Modify sale price with tax
- wt_feed_filter_product_current_price($price, $product, $form_data) - Modify current price
- wt_feed_filter_product_current_price_with_tax($price, $product, $form_data) - Current price with tax
- wt_feed_filter_product_image($image, $product, $form_data) - Modify product main image URL
- wt_feed_filter_product_images($images, $product, $form_data) - Modify gallery image URLs
- wt_feed_filter_product_feature_image($image, $product, $form_data) - Modify featured image
- wt_feed_filter_product_link($link, $product, $form_data) - Modify product URL
- wt_feed_filter_product_canonical_link($link, $product, $form_data) - Modify canonical URL
- wt_feed_filter_product_add_to_cart_link($link, $product, $form_data) - Modify add-to-cart URL
- wt_feed_filter_product_parent_link($link, $product, $form_data) - Modify parent product URL
- wt_feed_filter_product_sku($sku, $product, $form_data) - Modify SKU
- wt_feed_filter_product_sku_id($sku_id, $product, $form_data) - Modify SKU ID
- wt_feed_filter_product_parent_sku($sku, $product, $form_data) - Modify parent SKU for variations
- wt_feed_filter_product_id($id, $product, $form_data) - Modify product ID
- wt_feed_filter_product_item_group_id($id, $product, $form_data) - Modify item group ID (for variations)
- wt_feed_filter_product_availability($avail, $product, $form_data) - Modify availability
- wt_feed_filter_product_availability_date($date, $product, $form_data) - Modify availability date
- wt_feed_filter_product_brand($brand, $product, $form_data) - Modify brand
- wt_feed_filter_product_condition($condition, $product, $form_data) - Modify condition
- wt_feed_filter_product_tags($tags, $product, $form_data) - Modify product tags
- wt_feed_filter_product_local_category($cat, $product, $form_data) - Modify product type/category path
- wt_feed_filter_product_primary_category($cat, $product, $form_data) - Modify primary category
- wt_feed_filter_product_child_category($cat, $product, $form_data) - Modify child (leaf) category
- wt_feed_filter_product_primary_category_id($id, $product, $form_data) - Modify primary category ID
- wt_feed_filter_product_child_category_id($id, $product, $form_data) - Modify child category ID
- wt_feed_filter_product_weight($weight, $product, $form_data) - Modify weight
- wt_feed_filter_product_height($height, $product, $form_data) - Modify height
- wt_feed_filter_product_width($width, $product, $form_data) - Modify width
- wt_feed_filter_product_length($length, $product, $form_data) - Modify length
- wt_feed_filter_product_tax_class($class, $product, $form_data) - Modify tax class
- wt_feed_filter_product_tax_status($status, $product, $form_data) - Modify tax status
- wt_feed_filter_product_visibility($visibility, $product, $form_data) - Modify visibility
- wt_feed_filter_product_quantity($qty, $product, $form_data) - Modify stock quantity
- wt_feed_filter_product_type($type, $product, $form_data) - Modify product type
- wt_feed_filter_product_currency($currency, $product, $form_data) - Modify currency
- wt_feed_filter_product_rating_average($rating, $product, $form_data) - Modify average rating
- wt_feed_filter_product_rating_total($total, $product, $form_data) - Modify total reviews count
- wt_feed_filter_product_date_created($date, $product, $form_data) - Modify creation date
- wt_feed_filter_product_date_updated($date, $product, $form_data) - Modify last updated date
- wt_feed_filter_product_is_bundle($val, $product, $form_data) - Modify is_bundle
- wt_feed_filter_product_is_multipack($val, $product, $form_data) - Modify multipack
- wt_feed_filter_product_google_category($cat, $product, $form_data) - Modify Google category
- wt_feed_filter_product_fb_category($cat, $product, $form_data) - Modify Facebook category
- wt_feed_filter_product_fruugo_category($cat, $product, $form_data) - Modify Fruugo category
- wt_feed_filter_product_pinterest_category($cat, $product, $form_data) - Modify Pinterest category
- wt_feed_filter_product_identifier_exists($val, $product, $form_data) - Modify identifier_exists
- wt_feed_filter_product_identification_type($type, $product, $form_data) - Modify identification type
- wt_feed_product_type_separator($separator) - Change category path separator (default ' > ')
- wt_feed_tags_separator($separator) - Change product tags separator
- wt_feed_filter_category_separator($separator) - Change category separator in feed

Facebook Catalog Sync Filters & Hooks:

- wt_facebook_sync_products($products) - Modify array of product IDs to sync with Facebook catalog. Use to include/exclude specific products.
  Example:
  add_filter('wt_facebook_sync_products', 'modify_wt_facebook_sync_products', 10, 1);
  function modify_wt_facebook_sync_products($products) {
    $exclude_products = array(2432, 2433, 2434);
    return array_diff($products, $exclude_products);
  }

- wt_facebook_product_description_mode($mode) - Set description type for Facebook sync. Valid values: 'short' (default) or 'long'.
  Example:
  add_filter('wt_facebook_product_description_mode', function($mode) { return 'long'; });

- wt_fb_sync_product_retailer_id($retailer_id, $product) - Modify product retailer ID for Facebook sync.

- wt_fbfeed_prepare_product_data($product_data, $product) - Modify product data array before sending to Facebook API.

- wt_fbfeed_item_update_request($request, $product) - Modify the Facebook API item update request.

- wt_facebook_connection_parameters($params) - Modify Facebook connection parameters.

- wt_facebook_connection_scopes($scopes) - Modify Facebook OAuth permission scopes.

- wt_facebook_external_business_id($id) - Modify the external business ID used for Facebook connection.

- wt_facebook_connection_business_name($name) - Modify the business name used in Facebook connection.

- wt_fb_categories($categories) - Modify Facebook categories list.

- wt_feed_facebook_catalog_product_checkout_link($link, $product) - Alter checkout URL for Facebook/Instagram catalog sync (added in v2.3.7).

- wt_feed_facebook_product_shipping($shipping, $product, $form_data) - Modify shipping data for Facebook feed.

- wt_feed_facebook_product_shipping_xml($xml, $product, $form_data) - Modify shipping XML for Facebook feed.

- wt_feed_facebook_product_age_group($age_group, $product, $form_data) - Modify age group for Facebook.

- wt_feed_facebook_product_gender($gender, $product, $form_data) - Modify gender for Facebook.

- wt_feed_facebook_product_color($color, $product, $form_data) - Modify color for Facebook.

- wt_feed_facebook_product_size($size, $product, $form_data) - Modify size for Facebook.

- wt_feed_facebook_product_conditions($cond, $product, $form_data) - Modify conditions for Facebook.

- wt_feed_facebook_product_agegroup($age, $product, $form_data) - Modify age group for Facebook feed.

Google Feed Filters & Hooks:

- wt_feed_google_product_shipping($shipping, $product, $form_data) - Modify shipping data for Google feed.

- wt_feed_google_product_shipping_xml($xml, $product, $form_data) - Modify shipping XML for Google feed.

- wt_feed_google_shipping_details($details, $product, $form_data) - Modify Google shipping details.

- wt_feed_google_product_agegroup($age, $product, $form_data) - Modify age group for Google feed.

- wt_feed_google_product_conditions($cond, $product, $form_data) - Modify conditions for Google feed.

Channel-specific title filter:
- wt_feed_google_product_title($title, $product, $form_data) - Modify title for Google feed specifically.

Channel-specific description filters (pattern: wt_feed_{channel}_product_{field}):
For each channel (google, facebook, bing, pinterest, tiktok, twitter, onbuy, fruugo, skroutz, etc.), the same pattern applies:
- wt_feed_{channel}_product_title
- wt_feed_{channel}_product_description
- wt_feed_{channel}_product_short_description
- wt_feed_{channel}_product_local_category
- etc.

CSV column header filter:
- wt_pf_alter_product_feed_csv_columns($columns) - Modify CSV column headers.

XML tag filter:
- wt_feed_alter_export_xml_tags($tags, $product, $form_data) - Modify XML tags in feed output.

Batch size filter:
- wt_woocommerce_csv_export_limit_per_request($batch_count) - Change number of products processed per AJAX batch request.

Shipping-related Filters & Hooks:

Class: Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Basic_Shipping
Used by: Google, Bing, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, and other channel feeds.

Shipping data is built from WooCommerce Shipping Zones. Local pickup methods are excluded automatically.
Shipping zones are cached via wp_cache for WEEK_IN_SECONDS.

Filters:
- wt_feed_shipping_attribute_price($price, $shipping) - Modify shipping attribute price. Return 0 to use free shipping.

- wt_feed_shipping_country_check($check) - Modify whether country check is applied when filtering shipping zones.

- wt_feed_filter_shipping_price($price, $method) - Modify shipping price for free shipping methods (returns 0).

- wt_feed_filter_shipping_attribute_price($price, $method) - Modify shipping price calculated from the method's cost attribute.

- wt_feed_processed_shipping_info($shipping_info, $shipping_zones, $product) - Modify final processed shipping info array before adding to feed.

- wt_feed_filter_chosen_method_id($id, $shipping, $method) - Modify the chosen shipping method ID.

For Bing feed:
- wt_feed_bing_product_shipping($shipping, $product, $form_data) - Modify shipping data for Bing feed.
- wt_feed_bing_product_shipping_xml($xml, $product, $form_data) - Modify shipping XML for Bing.
- wt_feed_bing_product_shipping_cp($val, $product, $form_data) - Modify Bing shipping country/price.
- wt_feed_bing_product_shipping_csp($val, $product, $form_data) - Modify Bing shipping country/state/price.

Feed Generation & Export Pipeline Filters:

- wt_pf_exporter_post_types_basic($types) - Modify available post types for export.

- wt_pf_exporter_steps_basic($steps) - Modify the feed creation wizard steps.

- wt_pf_exporter_alter_mapping_fields_basic($fields) - Modify mapping fields available in attribute mapping step.

- wt_pf_exporter_alter_meta_mapping_fields_basic($fields) - Modify meta fields shown in mapping dropdown.

- wt_pf_exporter_alter_mapping_enabled_fields_basic($fields) - Modify which mapping fields are enabled.

- wt_pf_exporter_alter_filter_fields_basic($fields) - Modify filter fields in the filter step.

- wt_pf_exporter_alter_advanced_fields_basic($fields) - Modify advanced settings fields.

- wt_pf_exporter_do_export_basic($result, $form_data, $offset, $step) - Hook into the export process itself.

- wt_pf_advanced_setting_fields_basic($fields) - Modify plugin-level advanced settings fields.

- wt_pf_admin_menu_basic($menu) - Modify admin menu items.

- wt_pf_allow_html_form_data($allow, $key) - Allow HTML in specific form data fields during export.

- wt_pf_mapping_allowed_html_option($html) - Modify allowed HTML in mapping options.

- wt_pf_catalog_regenerate_interval($interval) - Modify the catalog regeneration interval.

- wt_pf_remote_adapters_basic($adapters, $action, $adapter) - Get/modify remote file adapters (FTP, Google Drive, OneDrive) for feed delivery.

- wt_pf_plugin_settings_tabhead_basic($tabs) and wt_pf_export_settings_tabhead_basic($tabs) - Modify settings tab headings.

- wt_feed_product_identifier_exists($val, $product, $form_data) - Modify identifier_exists flag.

- wt_feed_additional_product_fields($fields, $product) - Add additional fields to product data.

- wt_feed_additional_variation_product_fields($fields, $product) - Add additional fields for variation products.

- wt_feed_product_agegroup($age, $product) - Modify age group globally across all channels.

- wt_feed_product_gender_options($options) - Modify available gender options in mapping.

Advanced Settings (Plugin Level):

Access: WordPress Admin > WebToffee Product Feed > Settings

Settings include:
- Default batch count: Number of products processed per request during feed generation.
- Default export method: Quick export by default.
- Feed auto-refresh interval: Options include hourly, twice daily, daily, weekly, and custom interval (added in v2.1.7). Filter: `wt_pf_catalog_regenerate_interval`.
- Server Cron (Premium): For managed hosting or large stores, use server-level cron for reliable feed updates.

Scheduled Actions Page: Available from v2.2.1. View and manage all scheduled feed refresh actions.

History/Logs:
- WooCommerce Product Sync Log: Track and review failed product syncs for troubleshooting.
- Log table: wt_pf_action_history (PHP constant: Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Sync::$history_tb)

Database Tables created by plugin:
- wt_pf_mapping_template: Stores saved mapping templates.
- wt_pf_action_history: Stores feed generation history/logs.
- wt_pf_cron: Stores cron/schedule data for feed refresh.

Plugin constants:
- WEBTOFFEE_PRODUCT_FEED_SYNC_VERSION: '2.3.7'
- WEBTOFFEE_PRODUCT_FEED_ID: 'webtoffee_product_feed'
- WEBTOFFEE_PRODUCT_FEED_MAIN_ID: 'webtoffee_product_feed_main'
- WT_PRODUCT_FEED_PLUGIN_URL: Plugin URL
- WT_PRODUCT_FEED_PLUGIN_PATH: Plugin filesystem path
- WT_PRODUCT_FEED_PLUGIN_NAME: 'WebToffee WooCommerce Product Feed & Sync Manager'
- WT_PF_DEBUG_BASIC: false (enable for debugging)

Managing Generated Feeds:

All generated product feeds appear in the Manage Feeds list page (WebToffee Product Feed > Manage Feeds).

Available actions per feed:
- Refresh Feed: Regenerate the feed file with current product data.
- Edit Feed: Modify the feed settings (opens wizard with pre-filled data via ?wt_pf_rerun parameter).
- Duplicate Feed: Create a copy of an existing feed (added in v2.2.1). Useful for creating similar feeds with minor changes.
- Delete Feed: Remove the feed and optionally its scheduled actions.
- View/Download Feed: Access the generated feed file URL.
- View History: Check feed generation log entries.

Feed Refresh Status: Shows real-time status of feed updates, last updated time, and scheduled refresh status.

Pagination and bulk delete: Available in Manage Feeds page (added in v2.1.7).

File column: Shows file type (XML, CSV, etc.) in the Manage Feeds list (added in v2.0.6).

Note: When deleting a feed, the corresponding scheduled action entry is also deleted (fixed in v2.0.5).

Product Filtering in Feed Generation:

Available filter options when creating/editing a feed:

1. Category Filter:
   - Include specific categories: Only include products from selected categories.
   - Exclude specific categories: Include all products except from selected categories.
   - Cat filter type stored as: cat_filter_type ('include_cat' or 'exclude_cat')
   - Form data key: post_type_form_data['item_inc_cat'] or post_type_form_data['item_exc_cat']

2. Include/Exclude Specific Products:
   - Filter by product ID: wt_pf_product (include list)
   - Exclude by product ID: wt_pf_exclude_product

3. Stock Status:
   - Filter by stock status: wt_pf_stock_status
   - Premium: Exclude out-of-stock products automatically.

4. Product Tags:
   - Filter by tag slugs: wt_pf_product_tags
   - Exclude by tag slugs: stored in exclude_tag query var

5. Product Types:
   - Filter by type (simple, variable, grouped, external): wt_pf_product_types

6. Product Status:
   - Filter by publish status: wt_pf_product_status (default: ['publish'])

7. Sort Options:
   - Sort by: wt_pf_sort_columns (default: 'ID')
   - Sort order: wt_pf_order_by (default: 'ASC')

8. Limit & Offset:
   - wt_pf_limit: Max products to export
   - wt_pf_offset: Starting offset

Exclude from Feed (per-product):
   Check 'Exclude from Feed' in the product edit page under WebToffee Product Feed tab. This sets _wt_feed_discard meta. Products with this meta are excluded via the woocommerce_product_data_store_cpt_get_products_query filter.

Private/draft variations: Fixed in v2.2.3 - private and draft variations are excluded from feeds.

Frequently Asked Questions:

Q: Do I need a Business Manager account to connect to Facebook?
A: Yes, a Facebook Business Manager account is required to connect your WooCommerce product catalog to Facebook.

Q: Does the plugin have additional costs?
A: No, the basic plugin is free and allows you to set up your store on Facebook, Instagram, Google Merchant Center using product feeds. Premium version available for advanced features.

Q: Is Server Cron available in the free version?
A: No, Server Cron is only available in the Premium version. The free version uses WordPress cron (WP-Cron).

Q: Can I send the product feed directly to Google Shop from WooCommerce?
A: No, the plugin generates the feed file. You must manually upload it to Google Merchant Center, or provide the feed URL in Google Merchant Center for scheduled fetching.

Q: How can I exclude specific products from Facebook catalog sync?
A: Use the `wt_facebook_sync_products` filter:
  add_filter('wt_facebook_sync_products', 'modify_wt_facebook_sync_products', 10, 1);
  function modify_wt_facebook_sync_products($products) {
    $exclude_products = array(2432, 2433, 2434); // product IDs to exclude
    return array_diff($products, $exclude_products);
  }

Q: Does the plugin support Facebook dynamic ads?
A: Yes, you can sync WooCommerce products to Facebook catalog to run dynamic ads.

Q: How do I set long description as default for Facebook catalog sync?
A: Use the `wt_facebook_product_description_mode` filter:
  add_filter('wt_facebook_product_description_mode', function($mode) { return 'long'; });
  Valid values: 'short' (default) or 'long'.

Q: The 'Refresh Feed' button is not regenerating the feed file.
A: This was fixed in v2.1.3. Update to the latest version.

Q: Facebook catalog sync is not working properly.
A: This was fixed in v2.3.7. Also fixed in v2.3.7: PHP Fatal error on is_type() call in Facebook export. Update to latest version.

Q: Category mapping dropdown was not rendering options properly.
A: Fixed in v2.3.5. Update to the latest version.

Q: Feed export shows empty when excluding a category in Facebook/Instagram catalog.
A: Fixed in v2.3.6. Update to the latest version.

Q: Product tags contain HTML links in the feed.
A: Fixed in v2.1.3. Product tags are now stripped of HTML.

Q: Draft or orphaned variations are appearing in the feed.
A: Fixed in v2.1.7 and v2.1.3. Private and draft variations excluded in v2.2.3.

Q: Price with tax is not showing correctly in the feed.
A: Fixed in v2.0.5.

Q: Why is my product feed not including all categories for Cyrillic characters?
A: Fixed in v2.0.6 - product category filter for Cyrillic characters (Hebrew, Russian) was corrected.

Premium Version Features (not available in free/basic version):

1. Dynamic Price & Product Feed Update: Automatically updates feeds when product prices, stock, or details change in WooCommerce. Real-time sync without manual regeneration.

2. Advanced Product Filtering: Filter by price range, stock status, specific attributes, and more complex conditions. Multiple rules per feed.

3. Exclude Out-of-Stock Products: Automatically remove out-of-stock items from feeds.

4. Server Cron for Managed Hosting: Schedule feed updates using server-level cron (not WP-Cron). Essential for large stores or managed hosting environments that restrict WP-Cron.

5. Auto-Catalog Sync for Facebook: Automatic real-time syncing of product changes to Facebook catalog without manual triggers.

6. Multilingual & Multicurrency (WPML): Create multilingual product feeds with WPML. Supports WCML for multi-currency feeds. Compatible plugins: WPML, Translatepress, Aelia Currency Switcher, Fox Currency Switcher, Curcy Currency Switcher.

7. Custom Product Feeds: Generate feeds for any platform with fully custom field mapping and format.

8. Customize Product Variations: Choose which variations to include: all variations, default variation, or lowest-priced variation.

9. Perfect Brands & WooCommerce Brands compatibility: Include brand information from Perfect Brands or WooCommerce Brands plugins in feeds.

10. Multi-Vendor Support: Compatible with Dokan Multivendor and WC Vendors plugins. Generate vendor-specific feeds.

11. Google Manufacturer Center feed.

12. Discount Rules integration: Compatible with Discount Rules for WooCommerce and YITH WooCommerce Dynamic Pricing & Discounts - shows discounted prices in feeds.

Plugin Compatibility:

WooCommerce HPOS (High-Performance Order Storage / Custom Order Tables):
- Declared compatible with WooCommerce custom_order_tables feature.
- Declaration added via WooCommerce FeaturesUtil::declare_compatibility() in the main plugin file.

WooCommerce Block Editor (Product Block Editor):
- Supports new WooCommerce block-based product editor (enabled when woocommerce_feature_product_block_editor_enabled = 'yes').
- Added in v2.1.6 for simple products and v2.1.6 for product variations.

SEO Plugins (added in v2.1.7):
- Yoast SEO: product data from Yoast can be used in feed.
- Rank Math SEO with AI SEO Tools.
- All in One SEO.

Brand Plugins:
- Perfect Brands for WooCommerce (wordpress.org/plugins/perfect-woocommerce-brands/)
- WooCommerce Brands plugin.
- Brand data auto-detected and available in attribute mapping (Basic: v2.0.9, Variation sync: v2.1.1).

Multi-Vendor:
- Dokan Multivendor
- WC Vendors

Multi-Currency (Premium):
- WCML (WooCommerce Multilingual & Multicurrency)
- Aelia Currency Switcher
- Fox Currency Switcher
- Curcy Currency Switcher

Discount Plugins (Premium):
- Discount Rules for WooCommerce
- YITH WooCommerce Dynamic Pricing & Discounts

WordPress: Tested OK with WordPress 6.9.1
WooCommerce: Tested OK with WooCommerce 10.5.3

Product Variation Handling in Feeds:

For variable products, the plugin exports each variation as a separate line item in the feed, with item_group_id linking variations to their parent.

item_group_id: The parent product ID is used as item_group_id for all variations.

Variation-specific attributes handled:
- Color: mapped from pa_color or colour attribute
- Size: mapped from pa_size attribute
- Gender: mapped from pa_gender attribute
- Pattern: mapped from pa_pattern attribute
- Additional variant attributes: Any other variation attributes are mapped via additional_variant_attribute field.

Sanitize variant name logic:
- 'attribute_' and 'pa_' prefixes are stripped.
- 'colour' is normalized to 'color'.
- Known attributes (size, color, gender, pattern) are handled as standard fields.
- All other attributes become 'custom_data:{name}'.

For CSV/TXT/XLSX formats, additional variant attributes are formatted as: 'Label:value,Label2:value2'
For XML, they become separate XML nodes.

For description fallback:
- If variation description is empty, parent product description is used.
- If parent description is empty, short description is used.

Parent product fields available for mapping:
- parent_title: Parent product name
- parent_description: Parent product description
- parent_sku: Parent product SKU
- parent_link: Parent product URL

In Facebook catalog sync, additional variation attributes can be included (added in v2.1.3 and v2.1.5).

Premium: Choose to export all variations, only default variation, or only lowest-priced variation.

Shipping Data in Product Feeds:

The plugin reads WooCommerce Shipping Zones to generate shipping data for feeds (Google, Bing, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, etc.).

Class: Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Basic_Shipping

Shipping data collection:
- Iterates all WooCommerce Shipping Zones.
- For each zone, gets enabled shipping methods (excludes local_pickup).
- Per method: captures zone_id, zone_name, country, state, postcode, service name, method_id, method_instance_id, method_title, min_amount, and calculated price.
- Shipping options are cached with wp_cache (WEEK_IN_SECONDS).

Shipping price calculation:
- For free_shipping methods: price = 0 (filter: wt_feed_filter_shipping_price)
- For other methods: price derived from method's cost attribute (filter: wt_feed_filter_shipping_attribute_price)
- Custom price override: wt_feed_shipping_attribute_price

For UK shipping: Fixed in v2.1.0.
Region in shipping details: Added in v2.0.6.

In the feed output:
- Google: shipping element contains country:state:service:price
- Bing: similar structure, with country/state/price fields
- Facebook: shipping element in XML/JSON

Troubleshooting shipping in feed:
- Ensure WooCommerce Shipping Zones are configured.
- Local Pickup methods are always excluded.
- Check country settings in shipping zones.
- If shipping data is wrong, use wt_feed_processed_shipping_info filter to override.

Google Product Reviews Feed:

Added in v2.2.1. Improved in v2.2.5, v2.2.7.

This is a separate feed type from the Google Shopping feed. It generates a Google Product Reviews XML feed that can be submitted to Google Merchant Center for Rich Snippets and Shopping ads.

The feed includes:
- Product reviews from WooCommerce
- Star ratings
- Reviewer name and date
- Product identifiers (SKU/GTIN)

Channel module location: admin/modules/google_product_reviews/

Submit the generated feed URL to Google Merchant Center under Products > Product Reviews.

Adding Static Values to Product Feeds:

Added in v2.0.9.

Static values allow you to set a fixed value for any feed attribute that applies to ALL products in the feed, without needing individual product data.

Use cases:
- Set `condition` = 'new' for all products
- Set `brand` = 'MyBrand' for all products
- Set `availability` = 'in_stock' for all
- Add a `custom_label_0` value like 'Sale' to all items

How to use:
1. In the Attribute Mapping step, select the field you want to set.
2. In the mapping source dropdown, choose 'Static Value'.
3. Enter the static text value.

Static values are saved as part of the feed template mapping data.

Feed Auto-Refresh / Scheduling:

The plugin supports automatic feed regeneration on a schedule using WordPress cron (WP-Cron).

Schedule options:
- Hourly (added in v2.0.2)
- Twice Daily
- Daily (default)
- Weekly
- Custom time interval (added in v2.1.7): Set any custom interval in minutes/hours.

Filter to modify available intervals: `wt_pf_catalog_regenerate_interval($interval)`

Database table for cron data: wt_pf_cron

Scheduled Actions Page (v2.2.1): View and manage all scheduled feed refresh actions in a dedicated admin page.

Server Cron (Premium only):
- For sites on managed hosting (WP Engine, Kinsta, etc.) where WP-Cron may not run reliably.
- Also recommended for large stores with 10,000+ products.
- Uses actual server cron job (crontab) instead of WP-Cron.

Troubleshooting: If feed is not auto-refreshing:
1. Verify WP-Cron is not disabled (DISABLE_WP_CRON not set to true in wp-config.php).
2. Check Scheduled Actions page to see if actions are queued.
3. Consider using a real cron job to trigger wp-cron.php periodically.
4. For managed hosting, upgrade to Premium for Server Cron.

Security Measures in the Plugin:

Access Control:
- Class: Wt_Pf_Sh (helper: helpers/class-wt-security-helper.php)
- Method: Wt_Pf_Sh::check_write_access(WEBTOFFEE_PRODUCT_FEED_ID) - checks both nonce and user role.
- Role access filter: wt_{plugin_id}_alter_role_access_basic($roles) - modify which user roles can access plugin features.
- Default role required: manage_woocommerce or administrator.

Input Sanitization:
- All POST/GET inputs are sanitized using WordPress sanitize functions (sanitize_text_field, wp_unslash, etc.).
- HTML form data controlled by filter: wt_pf_allow_html_form_data($allow, $key) - returns false by default (no HTML).
- WooCommerce webhooks verified with HMAC secret.

Security fixes in recent versions:
- v2.3.4: Vulnerability fix (Mrreee/Patchstack)
- v2.3.2: Vulnerability fix (Legion Hunter)
- v2.2.9: Vulnerability fix (@domiee13)
- v2.3.5: Replaced maybe_unserialize() with custom wt_decode_data() function to prevent object injection.

Filename validation: Improved in v2.1.8 to prevent path traversal in feed filenames.

Google Local Inventory Ads & Local Product Inventory:

Added in v2.0.9 (Local Inventory Ads, Local Promotions, Buy on Google) and v2.1.7 (full Fruugo and Google local inventory ads).

Two separate channel types:
1. Google Local Product Inventory (admin/modules/google_local_product_inventory/): Feeds for products available in physical store locations.
2. Google Local Inventory Ads (admin/modules/google_local_inventory_ads/): Feeds for local inventory ads on Google.

These feeds typically include store code, price, quantity, and availability at the store location.

Buy on Google: Separate feed type for the Buy on Google program (checkout on Google). Requires checkout_link_template field (added in v2.2.6).

Channel Module File Structure:

Each sales channel is a module under admin/modules/{channel_name}/:
- {channel}.php: Main channel class, defines channel name, feed fields, default mapping.
- export/export.php: Export class extending Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Product.
- data/data-product-post-columns.php: Defines the channel-specific product columns/attributes.
- data/{channel}_taxonomy.txt: (if applicable) Channel category taxonomy.
- data/wt-feed-category-mapping.php: (if applicable) Pre-saved category mapping.

All export classes extend: Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Product (admin/modules/export/wt-product.php)
Core export module: admin/modules/export/export.php (class: Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Sync_Export)

The module system is controlled by:
- Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Sync::load_modules($module) - Load a module by base name.
- Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Sync_Admin::module_exists($module) - Check if module exists.
- Module IDs formatted as: webtoffee_product_feed_main_{module_base}

AJAX handler for export: wp_ajax_pf_export_ajax_basic → Webtoffee_Product_Feed_Sync_Export::ajax_main()

Troubleshooting Common Issues:

1. Feed is empty or not generating:
   - Check if WooCommerce is active.
   - Verify products have 'publish' status (default filter).
   - Check if categories are mapped to 'exclude' accidentally.
   - Check that 'Exclude from Feed' is not checked on individual products.
   - For Facebook/Instagram: Fixed empty feed on category exclusion in v2.3.6.

2. Facebook catalog sync not working:
   - Fixed in v2.3.7. Update to latest version.
   - Fatal error on is_type() also fixed in v2.3.7.
   - Check Facebook Business Manager connection status.
   - Ensure Facebook API permissions are granted.
   - For large catalogs, enable batch sync.

3. Category mapping dropdown not showing options:
   - Fixed in v2.3.5. Update to latest version.

4. Products with duplicate/wrong descriptions:
   - Variations fall back to parent description if variation description is empty.
   - Use filter wt_feed_filter_product_description to override.

5. Price with tax not correct:
   - Fixed in v2.0.5.
   - Check WooCommerce tax settings (woocommerce_tax_display_shop).

6. Shipping data missing or wrong:
   - Ensure WooCommerce Shipping Zones are configured.
   - Local pickup is always excluded from shipping data.
   - Use wt_feed_processed_shipping_info filter to override shipping data.

7. Translations not loading (load_textdomain_just_in_time warning):
   - Fixed in v2.3.0 and v2.2.9. Update to latest version.

8. PHP 8.2 deprecation notices:
   - Creation of dynamic properties fixed in v2.0.6.

9. Feed not auto-refreshing:
   - Check if WP-Cron is disabled.
   - Check Scheduled Actions page.
   - Consider Server Cron (Premium) for managed hosting.

10. Enabling debug mode:
    - Set constant WT_PF_DEBUG_BASIC = true in wp-config.php for debug output.

11. Feed file location:
    - Files stored at: wp-content/uploads/webtoffee_product_feed/
    - Ensure this directory is writable.
